title: MobManagement
description: This mod allowes you to prevent mobs from spawning with certain items.
body:
### **Want to prevent that zombies from spawning with armor or swords?**
Here you go!
With this mod you can customize with wich items mobs can or can not spawn!
## **Examples are:**
1. No Leather Armor
2. No Chainmail Armor
3. No Iron Armor
4. No Golden Armor
5. No Diamond Armor
6. No Iron Swords
7. No Iron Shovels

## How do I add items?
You add items by going into the config screen(RSHIFT),
select the mob from whom you want to edit the blacklist, enter the item id and click add to blacklist.
To view the blacklist you can either click the show blacklist button or hover over the button of a specific mob whose blacklist you want to see.

  **Please note:** This mod is in very early development and bugs are to be expected.
   More mobs are going to be added to the mod and the gui will improve.
    Press right shift to enter the item selection menu. And yes, the Mob Managenemt message says Zombie Management. Why? Im to lazy to fix it.
